summary: Diff adds a Universal Launch Report page and a TanStack Router route, plus new React Query hooks to poll treasury/omni-mesh/cycles/DAO proposals every 10s. However, the diff summary does not provide evidence that the backend `getCyclesBalance` query method (with RBAC) was added, nor that TypeScript canister bindings were updated, and it’s unclear whether KD Dashboard navigation includes an entry to the new report route.

missing_requirements.requirement: KD Platform Dashboard includes a navigation control that routes to the Universal Launch Report page.
missing_requirements.reason: `frontend/src/pages/KDDashboardPage.tsx` is truncated and the shown portion does not include any button/link that navigates to `/kd-platform/universal-launch-report` (only a Back to Landing button is visible).

missing_requirements.requirement: Use the existing React Query hooks flow in `frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts + useActor` to fetch the required metrics for the report.
missing_requirements.reason: Instead of adding report queries to the existing `frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts`, the diff adds a new hooks file `useUniversalLaunchReportQueries.ts`. The BuildRequest explicitly called out using the existing `useQueries.ts` hook structure.

missing_requirements.requirement: Add backend query method `getCyclesBalance` in `backend/main.mo` returning current canister cycles balance and gated with the same RBAC pattern used by other NOC methods (AccessControl.hasPermission(..., #user)).
missing_requirements.reason: `backend/main.mo` is truncated and the shown snippet only shows imports (including `ExperimentalCycles`) and type declarations; it does not show a new public query method named `getCyclesBalance` nor any RBAC gating logic.

missing_requirements.requirement: Update frontend canister/type bindings so `getCyclesBalance` is available to TypeScript imports/typed actor bindings and builds without missing-method errors.
missing_requirements.reason: The report hooks call `actor.getCyclesBalance()`, but the diff summary does not show any update to the generated/declared backend interface/bindings that would add `getCyclesBalance` (e.g., in a `backend` declarations file).

hallucinated_features.description: Added a separate report-specific hooks module (`useUniversalLaunchReportQueries.ts`) rather than extending the existing `frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts`.
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest did not ask for a new hooks module; it specifically referenced using the existing `useQueries.ts` flow.

hallucinated_features.description: Use of emojis in user-facing UI strings (e.g., "🔐 Access Required", "🚀", "🌐").
hallucinated_features.reason: The requirement specifies English-only user-facing text; emojis are not explicitly requested and may violate a strict interpretation of that constraint.
